Home / Service Areas / Nashville

Landscaping company in Nashville, TN

Trusted local professionals serving Nashville and surrounding communities

Serving Nashville, TN

First Green Landscapes, LLC proudly serves the vibrant city of Nashville, Tennessee, offering a comprehensive range of landscaping services to meet the diverse needs of its residents and businesses. From the bustling downtown area to the charming residential neighborhoods, we understand the unique landscaping challenges and opportunities that Nashville presents. We are committed to creating beautiful and sustainable outdoor spaces that enhance the city's appeal and contribute to its growing reputation. Our services in Nashville include lawn care, landscape design, hardscaping, irrigation, and seasonal maintenance. We work closely with our clients to understand their vision and create customized landscaping solutions that meet their specific needs and budget. Whether you are looking to create a relaxing backyard oasis, enhance the curb appeal of your home, or maintain a thriving commercial landscape, First Green Landscapes, LLC is your trusted partner in Nashville.

Nashville, TN, as a major metropolitan area, features diverse landscaping needs ranging from urban gardens to suburban lawns, all within a climate of hot, humid summers.

Landscaping company Services in Nashville

Landscape Design

Elevate your property with a custom landscape design that reflects your vision.

Learn more →

Lawn Care & Maintenance

Keep your lawn lush and healthy with our comprehensive maintenance programs.

Learn more →

Hardscaping

Enhance your outdoor living space with custom patios, walkways, and retaining walls.

Learn more →

Irrigation Systems

Efficient and reliable irrigation systems to keep your landscape hydrated.

Learn more →

Outdoor Lighting

Enhance the beauty and safety of your property with professionally installed outdoor lighting.

Learn more →

Drainage Solutions

Protect your property from water damage with effective drainage solutions.

Learn more →
